name: J. Dolan's
tagline: New York-style pizza and craft beer in Kaimuki — often cited as the best slice on the island.
mustOrder: pepperoni pizza — classic NY style, perfectly charred
craft beer selection — rotating taps worth exploring
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; Kahala Mall lot nearby
talkStory: Kaimuki's neighborhood pizza and beer joint since ~2014. Hand-tossed New York-style pies, good craft beer selection, and a laid-back vibe that draws UH students, young professionals, and Kaimuki regulars. If Brick Fire Tavern is the wood-fired artisan option, Dolan's is the casual, grab-a-slice-and-a-beer counterpart. Also has a second location (Irish pub) on Bethel St downtown. Late night friendly.
